sections.paragraph:
Original: יגה

Transliteration: yâgâh

Phonetic: yaw-gaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to afflict, grieve, suffer, cause grief
    1. (Niphal) grieved, grieving (participle)
    2. (Piel) to grieve
    3. (Hiphil) to cause grief, cause sorrow

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 839

Part(s) of speech: Verb
